languages.text: "Вместе мы пойдем к звездам и дадим отпор ужасам космоса во славу династии!"
"Together, we shall go to the stars and defy the terrors of space for the glory of the dynasty!"
languages.original_text: "Вместе мы пойдем к звездам и дадим отпор ужасам космоса во славу династии!"

traits.locale_text: "Together, we shall go to the stars and defy the terrors of space for the glory of the dynasty!"
"Together, we shall go to the stars and defy the terrors of space for the glory of the dynasty!"
"Together, we shall go to the stars and defy the terrors of space for the glory of the dynasty!"
"Together, we shall go to the stars and defy the terrors of space for the glory of the dynasty!"
"Together, we shall go to the stars and defy the terrors of space for the glory of the dynasty!"

languages.text: “我们将一同前往星辰，为了王朝的荣耀，向太空中的一切恐怖发起挑战！”
languages.original_text: "Together, we shall go to the stars and defy the terrors of space for the glory of the dynasty!"

traits.locale_text: “我们将一同前往星辰，为了王朝的荣耀，向太空中的一切恐怖发起挑战！”

languages.text: "Birlikte yıldızlara gidecek ve hanedanlığın şanı için uzayın dehşetlerine meydan okuyacağız!"
languages.original_text: "Together, we shall go to the stars and defy the terrors of space for the glory of the dynasty!"

traits.locale_text: "Birlikte yıldızlara gidecek ve hanedanlığın şanı için uzayın dehşetlerine meydan okuyacağız!"

languages.text: « Ensemble, nous sillonnerons les confins de l'univers et nous affronterons les horreurs spatiales pour la gloire de la dynastie ! »
languages.original_text: "Together, we shall go to the stars and defy the terrors of space for the glory of the dynasty!"

traits.locale_text: « Ensemble, nous sillonnerons les confins de l'univers et nous affronterons les horreurs spatiales pour la gloire de la dynastie ! »

languages.text: «¡Juntos, iremos a las estrellas y desafiaremos los horrores del espacio por la gloria de la dinastía!».
languages.original_text: "Together, we shall go to the stars and defy the terrors of space for the glory of the dynasty!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Juntos, iremos a las estrellas y desafiaremos los horrores del espacio por la gloria de la dinastía!».

languages.text: "Wir werden gemeinsam zu den Sternen reisen und den Schrecken des Weltraums für den Ruhm der Dynastie trotzen!"
languages.original_text: "Together, we shall go to the stars and defy the terrors of space for the glory of the dynasty!"

traits.locale_text: "Wir werden gemeinsam zu den Sternen reisen und den Schrecken des Weltraums für den Ruhm der Dynastie trotzen!"

languages.text: 「共に星々へ赴き、王朝の栄光のために宇宙の恐怖に立ち向かおう！」
languages.original_text: "Together, we shall go to the stars and defy the terrors of space for the glory of the dynasty!"

traits.locale_text: 「共に星々へ赴き、王朝の栄光のために宇宙の恐怖に立ち向かおう！」
